goals: Discover trending prediction markets across both Polymarket and Kalshi platforms
Explore economics and Fed rate markets on Kalshi that might affect craft supply prices and shipping costs
Get detailed analysis on how economic conditions could impact textile craft supplies

user_agent_config.personality: Curious hobbyist who shops for fabric and craft supplies online; interested in understanding how broader economic trends might affect prices and availability.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Does not know tool names or APIs; asks in natural language about prediction markets and economic trends affecting craft supplies.

end_condition: User has explored trending markets and economics-related prediction markets, and understands how these might relate to their craft hobby, or expresses satisfaction with the information received.
